title: SOMOS HISPANAS UNIDAS - 211info
text: SOMOS HISPANAS UNIDAS SILVERTON SOMOS HISPANAS UNIDAS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Encourages the Spanish-speaking community to share their culture and diverse backgrounds. Works with Latino parents and students to provide the knowledge and resources needed to graduate from high school and enter college. 512 N 1st Street Silverton, OR 97381 Eligibility: Nuestros Abuelos: Older adults who identify as Hispanic or Latino Juntos: Families who identify as Hispanic or Latino and have a student in grades 8-12 Hours: No standard hours Email (503) 873-7114 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 873-7114 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by program DOCUMENTS: Varies by program LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: State of Oregon SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday noon-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: From Salem: 14 miles west via Silverton Road From Portland: 42 miles via I-5 South Services: Cultural Heritage Groups * Hispanic/Latino Community Higher Education Awareness/Support Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Literacy Programs * Hispanic/Latino Community Parent/Family Involvement in Education * Hispanic/Latino Community Other Services Offered At This Location: LEGAL SERVICES - IMMIGRATION LEGAL AID If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
